content.query:
SELECT
DATEPART(dw, [EntryDate]) as EntryDateDayOfWeek
,[Sold]
,[EverSet]
,[EverVerified]
,[EverIssued]
,[EverNetIssued]
,[EverSat]
,[EverConfirmed]
,[OperatingCompany]
,sum([GrossSalesAmount]) as [GrossSalesAmount]
,count(1) as LeadCount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
 where 
 [EntryDate] >= '2018-01-01'
group BY
DATEPART(dw, [EntryDate])
,[Sold]
,[EverSet]
,[EverVerified]
,[EverIssued]
,[EverNetIssued]
,[EverSat]
,[EverConfirmed]
,[OperatingCompany]
